bank.retain_mission: Extract UX research findings, IA decisions, interaction patterns, usability test outcomes, and UI component standards. Capture stakeholder feedback and accepted vs. rejected proposals.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target users, jobs-to-be-done, validated patterns, accessibility constraints, and the user's design-system conventions. Ignore one-off prototype tweaks.

mental_models.name: User Insights
mental_models.source_query: Who are the target users, what jobs are they hiring the product for, and what UX research findings have we observed?

mental_models.name: Interaction Patterns
mental_models.source_query: Which interaction patterns and UI components have we validated? Include accessibility constraints and known anti-patterns.
